/usr/bin/ar qc libgame_core.a CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/server/game_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/server/service_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/server/message_dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/net/tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/net/tcp_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/net/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/net/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/net/codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/protocol/proto_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/player/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/player/player_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/login/login_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/match/match_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/match/match_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/room/room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/room/room_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game/input_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game/game_room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game/game_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game/state_sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game/settlement_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/storage/mysql_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/storage/redis_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/storage/player_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/storage/battle_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/rank/rank_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/timer/timer_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/util/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/config/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/common.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/login.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/match.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/room.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/game.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/game_core.dir/rank.pb.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgame_core.a
